summary: Sr. AI/ML Data Engineer with over 20 years of experience designing and building scalable data pipelines, ETL/ELT workflows, and ML-driven solutions for enterprise environments. Proficient in Python, SQL, and cloud platforms like GCP and AWS, with hands-on expertise in BigQuery, dbt, Airflow, and real-time systems for impactful business outcomes. Skilled in data modeling, CI/CD practices, and machine learning deployment to support event-driven architectures. Adept at collaborating with cross-functional teams to operationalize models and drive metric-based success. Eager to contribute to Public Storage by delivering robust data platforms and AI solutions that enhance real-time decisioning and business impact.

flagship_projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
flagship_projects.description: Developed an end-to-end agentic job application pipeline using Python and SQL, integrating vector embeddings and LLM orchestration for automated job scoring and resume tailoring. Implemented multi-step workflows with real-time data processing, ensuring high-quality outputs through automated gating mechanisms. Leveraged Claude Code and Grok (xAI) APIs to enhance AI-driven decisioning and application tracking.
highlights: Designed and built 10-step agentic orchestration pipeline (intake → score → tailor → generate → render → quality gate → track)
Implemented semantic duplicate detection using FAISS vector embeddings and sentence-transformers
Integrated Grok-3 LLM API for job scoring, resume tailoring, and cover letter generation

flagship_projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
flagship_projects.description: Engineered an AI-driven capacity forecasting engine using Python and SQL, replacing manual processes and reducing forecasting cycles by 90%. Developed Prophet and scikit-learn models to predict bottlenecks 6 months ahead, supporting real-time decisioning. Built an interactive Streamlit dashboard for actionable insights, aligning with data pipeline development best practices.
highlights: Replaced manual forecasting — cut cycles by 90%
Prophet + scikit-learn models predicting bottlenecks 6 months ahead
Interactive Streamlit dashboard for real-time capacity insights

flagship_projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
flagship_projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform using AWS tools like S3, Glue, and Athena, with Python and SQL for scalable data pipelines. Integrated GenAI capabilities with Bedrock for Text-to-SQL agents, enhancing data modeling efficiency. Optimized ETL processes with Parquet compression to address small file issues at enterprise scale.

flagship_projects.name: FAST Project
flagship_projects.description: Conducted data mining of user performance metrics using Python to optimize critical systems, supporting real-time decisioning. Created actionable insights through data pipeline development, enhancing system efficiency. Utilized Dynatrace for comprehensive monitoring and analysis.
